errorBoundaryTitle: Something went wrong on this screen
errorBoundaryBody: A UI error occurred. The rest of the app keeps working — return to the library or try again.
paramReadOnly: System parameter — read only. The game updates this value itself; editing it manually may break settings.
paramDisabled: Parameter is off (Off toggle). Turn it on and click Apply to edit.
presetSyncErrorMessage: Could not check sync status. Using local cache if available.
presetSyncOfflineMessage: Could not refresh presets. Using cache v{{version}}.
gpuFilterAmd: GPU {{name}}: DLSS unavailable — presets will use FSR 3 instead of DLSS.
gpuFilterIntel: GPU {{name}}: DLSS unavailable — presets will use FSR or TSR instead of DLSS.
gpuFilterNvidiaNoDlss: GPU {{name}}: DLSS unavailable — presets will use FSR instead. GTX has no Tensor Cores.
gpuFilterNvidiaNoFg: GPU {{name}}: Frame Generation unavailable — presets will not enable DLSS FG.
gpuFilterNvidiaDlssOnly: GPU {{name}}: DLSS available. Frame Generation (DLSS 3) — RTX 40 series and newer only.
